title: Was Third Impact inevitable
wikitext:
[]: Was Third Impact inevitable?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Nov 01, 2014 11:27 am I've heard this a few times from a few sources, but I've yet to understand. Was 3I doomed to happen no matter what after Adam woke up? Between SEELE, Gendo, the Angels, Rei, Kaworu, and so on there's at least a half dozen triggers in the plotline, but plot contrivances aside was the end always going to happen?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Nov 01, 2014 3:06 pm With the way that the Evaverse was set up, it is indeed my opinion that 3I would have happened at some point. You've got Seele and Gendo, both of whom are intent on making 3I happen in one way or another; it's practically a given that if one failed, the other would succeed. I can't see both of them failing.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sat Nov 01, 2014 3:09 pm Even if Seele had died out centruies ago Lilin still would eventually discover Adam or Lilith or build an S2 engine ourselves. At least, that's what seems to be intended.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 01, 2014 5:50 pm Well, ANIMA toyed with the concept that Third Impact was averted, but the fact is that there are so many extremely powerful people that want a Third Impact to happen (SEELE, Gendo, the Angels) that it would be almost impossible to prevent at least one of the players of trigger it: to beat the Angels you need Evas, and the only ones with the knowledge and funds to create Evas are SEELE, and the one with the administrative and manipulative talent to make said funds and knowledge be used effectively and NERV run more or less smoothly is Gendo. Even in Q when the truth about SEELE and Gendo's scheme were revealed and the good guys managed to create a big organization explicitly to prevent Impacts, SEELE still nearly managed to trigger their version of Instrumentality and only failed because Gendo double-crossed them, who himself is getting ready to launch his version of Instrumentality!

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sat Nov 01, 2014 8:22 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15939/No-Happy-Ending-Predestination-In-Rebuild/ Check this thread out if you want a discussion of Similar ideas.
